zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Wroth於1490年5月26日出生在英國米德萊可恩費爾德時，他的父親John Wroth40歲，母親Joan Margaret Newdigate40歲。他於1515年與Lady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kent在英國英格蘭肯特比曉普斯布恩結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1535年5月11日在他的家鄉享年44歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可恩費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Wroth于1490年5月26日出生在英国米德萊可恩費爾德时，他的父亲John Wroth40岁，母亲Joan Margaret Newdigate40岁。他于1515年与Lady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kent在英国英格兰肯特比曉普斯布恩结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1535年5月11日在他的家乡享年44岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可恩費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Wroth was born on 26 May 1490, in Enfield, Middlesex, England, his father, John Wroth, was 40 and his mother, Joan Margaret Newdigate, was 40. He married Lady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kent in 1515, in Bishopsbourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 11 May 1535, in his hometown, at the age of 44, and was buried in Enfield, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Wroth est né le 26 mai 1490, à Enfield, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, John Wroth, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Joan Margaret Newdigate, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Lady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kent en 1515, à Bishopsbourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 11 mai 1535, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Enfield, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Wroth am 26. Mai 1490 in Enfield, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Wroth 40 und seine Mutter Joan Margaret Newdigate 40. Er hat 1515 in Bishopsbourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom Lady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kent geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Mai 1535 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Enfield, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Wroth è nato il il 26 maggio 1490 nel Enfield, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, John Wroth, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Joan Margaret Newdigate, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Lady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kent nel 1515, nel Bishopsbourne, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 11 maggio 1535, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Enfield, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Wrothが1490年5月26日にイギリスミッドレセックスエンフィールドで生まれた時，父John Wrothは40歳，母Joan Margaret Newdigateは40歳であった。1515年にイギリスイギリスケントビショプスボウルンでLady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kentと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1535年5月11日に故郷で44歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスエンフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Wroth(이)가 1490년 5월 26일 영국 미들레세스 필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wroth(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Margaret Newdigate(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 비숍스번에서 Lady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1535년 5월 11일 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 필드에 묻혔다.

pt.26 May 1490–11 May 1535: 26 de maio de 1490–11 de maio de 1535
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Wroth nasceu em 26 de maio de 1490, em Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Wroth, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Joan Margaret Newdigate, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kent em 1515, em Bishopsbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de maio de 1535, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Wroth родился 26 мая 1490 г. в местности энфиелд, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Wroth было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Margaret Newdigate, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kent в 1515 г. в местности бишопсбурн, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 11 мая 1535 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности энфиелд, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.26 May 1490–11 May 1535: 26 de mayo de 1490–11 de mayo de 1535
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Wroth nació el 26 de mayo de 1490, en Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Wroth, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Joan Margaret Newdigate, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Lady Jane Haute of Bishopsbourne Kent en 1515, en Bishopsbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 11 de mayo de 1535, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
